MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-17-2017 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER JULIA SVEDISE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE DUE TO INSUFFICIENT INFORMATION. THE COURT STATES THAT IF APPLICANT WILL RE-APPLY FOR A FEE WAIVER AND A HEARING IS SET, APPLICANT MUST APPEAR AT THE HEARING. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: A.
